questions.prompt: This report should ____ before the meeting.
questions.explanationEn: After a modal verb like should, passive uses be + past participle.
questions.explanationZh: should 這類情態助動詞後面，被動要用 be + 過去分詞。
questions.phraseNote: should be reviewed / should be checked are common work phrases.

breakdown.label: modal clue
breakdown.text: should 後面一定接原形，所以被動不能直接用 checked。

breakdown.label: passive form
breakdown.text: modal + be + past participle: should be checked.

breakdown.label: meaning
breakdown.text: 報告是被檢查，不是報告自己檢查別人。

breakdown.label: common trap
breakdown.text: should checked 少了 be；should been checked 也不對，因為 modal 後要 be。

questions.prompt: All applications must ____ by Friday at 5 p.m.
questions.explanationEn: TOEIC often tests notices and office rules. After must, passive uses be submitted.
questions.explanationZh: 多益常考公告/規定。must 後面的被動是 be submitted。
questions.phraseNote: Applications must be submitted by... = 申請必須在...前提交。

breakdown.label: deadline clue
breakdown.text: by Friday at 5 p.m. 是多益常見截止時間線索。

breakdown.label: office notice pattern
breakdown.text: All applications + must + be submitted + by deadline.

breakdown.label: why passive
breakdown.text: applications 是被提交的東西，所以要用被動。

breakdown.label: common trap
breakdown.text: must submitted 少了 be；have submitted 會變成申請自己提交。

questions.prompt: If I had checked the tense, I ____ the mistake.
questions.explanationEn: This is an unreal past condition. Use if + had done, would have done.
questions.explanationZh: 這是過去假設：if + had done，結果句用 would have done。
questions.phraseNote: I would have avoided... = 我本來可以避免...

breakdown.label: past regret clue
breakdown.text: If I had checked 表示過去其實沒有檢查。

breakdown.label: third conditional
breakdown.text: If + had + Vpp, would have + Vpp.

breakdown.label: result
breakdown.text: avoid 的過去分詞是 avoided，所以答案是 would have avoided。

breakdown.label: common trap
breakdown.text: would avoid 是假設現在/未來，不是過去後悔。

questions.prompt: I wish I ____ more confident when speaking English.
questions.explanationEn: Wish + past form describes an unreal present. Were is the classic form for unreal situations.
questions.explanationZh: wish + 過去式表示現在不是這樣但希望是這樣。were 是標準假設用法。
questions.phraseNote: I wish I were more... is useful for self-reflection.

breakdown.label: wish clue
breakdown.text: I wish 指現在的願望，通常暗示現實相反。

breakdown.label: unreal present
breakdown.text: wish + past form: I wish I were / had / knew.

breakdown.label: best answer
breakdown.text: were 是假設語氣最標準的形式。

breakdown.label: common trap
breakdown.text: will be 表示未來，不符合 wish 現在反事實。

questions.prompt: If governments invested more in public transport, cities ____ less polluted.
questions.explanationEn: IELTS writing often uses second conditionals for hypothetical policy results.
questions.explanationZh: 雅思寫作常用第二條件句表達假設政策結果：if + 過去式, would + 原形。
questions.phraseNote: If governments invested more..., cities would... is useful for IELTS Task 2.

breakdown.label: policy hypothesis
breakdown.text: If governments invested more 表示假設政策，不是在講已發生事實。

breakdown.label: second conditional
breakdown.text: If + past simple, would + base verb/adjective complement.

breakdown.label: result clause
breakdown.text: cities would be less polluted 是假設結果。

breakdown.label: common trap
breakdown.text: will be 太直接，像真實未來預測，不像假設討論。

questions.prompt: You ____ bring your own laptop. We have computers here.
questions.explanationEn: Don't have to means it is not necessary. Mustn't means prohibited.
questions.explanationZh: don't have to 是不必；mustn't 是禁止，意思差很多。
questions.phraseNote: You don't have to... is softer and common in daily English.

breakdown.label: context clue
breakdown.text: We have computers here 表示沒有必要自己帶。

breakdown.label: necessity
breakdown.text: don't have to = not necessary；mustn't = prohibited.

breakdown.label: natural meaning
breakdown.text: You don't have to bring your own laptop = 你不用自己帶。

breakdown.label: common trap
breakdown.text: mustn't bring 會變成禁止帶，語氣和意思都太強。

questions.prompt: She ____ be at the office. Her car isn't there.
questions.explanationEn: Can't is used for strong negative deduction.
questions.explanationZh: can't 可以用來表示強烈負面推論：一定不可能。
questions.phraseNote: She can't be there is more natural than she mustn't be there.

breakdown.label: evidence clue
breakdown.text: Her car isn't there 是用證據做推論。

breakdown.label: negative deduction
breakdown.text: can't + be 表示『一定不可能在』。

breakdown.label: natural answer
breakdown.text: She can't be at the office = 她不可能在辦公室。

breakdown.label: common trap
breakdown.text: mustn't 通常是禁止，不是根據證據推論。

questions.prompt: I ____ the answer before submitting it.
questions.explanationEn: Should have + past participle talks about a better past choice.
questions.explanationZh: should have + 過去分詞表示過去本來應該做。
questions.phraseNote: I should have checked... = 我本來應該檢查...

breakdown.label: past action clue
breakdown.text: before submitting it 指提交前的事，通常是在後悔過去。

breakdown.label: regret pattern
breakdown.text: should have + past participle = 本來應該做但沒做。

breakdown.label: verb form
breakdown.text: check 的過去分詞是 checked，所以是 should have checked。

breakdown.label: common trap
breakdown.text: should checked、should to check、should have check 都缺少正確結構。

questions.prompt: He is said ____ the company last year.
questions.explanationEn: Use is said to have done when the reported action happened earlier.
questions.explanationZh: 據說的動作發生得更早，要用 is said to have done。
questions.phraseNote: is said to have... is common in news and formal writing.

breakdown.label: reported passive
breakdown.text: He is said... 是正式英文常見的報導式被動。

breakdown.label: earlier action
breakdown.text: last year 表示離開公司早於現在的 is said。

breakdown.label: perfect infinitive
breakdown.text: earlier action 用 to have + past participle: to have left。

breakdown.label: common trap
breakdown.text: to leave 可能是同時或未來；left 不能直接接在 is said 後。

questions.explanationEn: Have something done uses have + object + past participle.
questions.explanationZh: have something done 句型是 have + 受詞 + 過去分詞。
questions.phraseNote: I had my laptop repaired = 我請人修了筆電。

breakdown.label: service clue
breakdown.text: my laptop 通常不是自己修自己，而是請人修。

breakdown.label: causative passive
breakdown.text: have + object + past participle: had my laptop repaired.

breakdown.label: meaning
breakdown.text: I had my laptop repaired = 我讓/請人把筆電修好。

breakdown.label: common trap
breakdown.text: repair 或 to repair 會像自己要去修，不符合 have something done。

questions.prompt: Please call me when you ____ the report.
questions.explanationEn: After when in a future time clause, use present simple, not will.
questions.explanationZh: 未來時間子句 when 後面用現在式，不直接用 will。
questions.phraseNote: Please call me when you finish... is common workplace English.

breakdown.label: future meaning
breakdown.text: Please call me 是未來動作，但 when 子句不用 will。

breakdown.label: time clause
breakdown.text: when / after / before / as soon as + present simple.

breakdown.label: correct form
breakdown.text: when you finish the report 是自然且正確的工作英文。

breakdown.label: common trap
breakdown.text: when you will finish 是中文直翻式錯誤。

choices: Do you have got a minute?
questions.explanationEn: Do you have a minute? is a very common natural phrase.
questions.explanationZh: Do you have a minute? 是很自然常用的片語，意思是「你有空一下嗎？」
questions.phraseNote: Use this before asking a quick work question.

breakdown.label: native phrase
breakdown.text: 問對方有沒有一點時間，最自然是 Do you have a minute?

breakdown.label: question form
breakdown.text: do + subject + have + object 是一般現在式問句。

breakdown.label: work usage
breakdown.text: 這句很適合用在工作訊息或開口問問題前。

breakdown.label: common trap
breakdown.text: Do you have got 混用 do 和 have got；Are you have 文法不成立。
